# Pull Request Checklist for Issue #44

Before submitting your PR, ensure you've completed:

## Code Quality
- [ ] All linting errors resolved
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented
- [ ] Comments and JSDoc added where needed

## Testing
- [ ] API endpoint tested manually
- [ ] CLI tool tested with sample repositories
- [ ] Validated against multiple repository types
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing functionality

## Documentation
- [ ] All required documentation files created
- [ ] Code examples are accurate and tested
- [ ] README or docs updated if needed
- [ ] Changelog considerations noted

## Git Best Practices
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (feat/issue-44-xxx)
- [ ] PR references issue number (#44)
- [ ] All files properly staged and committed

## Issue Requirements
- [ ] All acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Required files created:
  - [ ] `app/server/src/utils/opensourceScoring.js`
  - [ ] `docs/SCORING_METHODOLOGY.md`
  - [ ] `research/oss-analysis-results.md`
- [ ] Research objectives addressed
- [ ] Scoring system validated

## PR Description
- [ ] Clear overview of changes
- [ ] Links to related issues (#44)
- [ ] Test instructions included
- [ ] Screenshots/examples provided (if applicable)
- [ ] Breaking changes noted (if any)
